admissions.testing_policy: Temple is test-optional for first-year applicants; SAT or ACT scores are entirely optional and are not required for admission.
admissions.gpa_policy: No explicit minimum GPA was found on the cited official pages used in this auto-enrichment pass.

evidence.source_excerpt: Pursue your intellectual and personal passions through Temple’s 600+ dynamic academic programs. You’ll study with faculty at the forefront of their fields in both scholarship and teaching. Learn to question your own assumptions and test innovative hypotheses as part of a diverse, engaged student body.

evidence.claim: Use a summer session to delve into a challenging course without interruption or get ahead in your coursework outside the regular semester’s constraints. Learn about Temple’s Continuing Education program and summer sessions .
evidence.source_excerpt: Use a summer session to delve into a challenging course without interruption or get ahead in your coursework outside the regular semester’s constraints. Learn about Temple’s Continuing Education program and summer sessions .

evidence.claim: After receiving recommendations from multiple professors to apply for a Goldwater Scholarship, one of the most prestigious undergraduate STEM awards, Leo Battalora won the award for his coveted research in Temple’s Electrical and Computer Engineering Department.
evidence.source_excerpt: After receiving recommendations from multiple professors to apply for a Goldwater Scholarship, one of the most prestigious undergraduate STEM awards, Leo Battalora won the award for his coveted research in Temple’s Electrical and Computer Engineering Department.

evidence.claim: Temple is test-optional for first-year applicants; SAT or ACT scores are entirely optional and are not required for admission.
evidence.source_excerpt: Standardized test scores are otherwise entirely optional and in no way required for admission.

evidence.claim: Ranked top 5 professors from RateMyProfessors by rating count and sentiment metrics.
evidence.source_excerpt: Matched RateMyProfessors school 'Temple University' (legacyId=999) and ranked all professors with at least one rating.

evidence.claim: Ranked top 10 notable alumni from Wikipedia-derived candidate lists using trailing pageviews.
evidence.source_excerpt: Candidates were harvested from school-specific Wikipedia alumni/people pages or categories, filtered to likely people, then ranked by pageviews.

warnings: Major titles still need manual follow-up; no reliable official title list was extracted in this pass.
Phase 5 auto-enrichment completed using official-school web crawl heuristics; manual spot-checking is still recommended for edge cases.

admissions.course_rigor was reset to unknown during manual cleanup because the earlier auto-extracted text was unrelated to the requested admissions field.
admissions.recommendations was reset to unknown during manual cleanup because the earlier auto-extracted text was unrelated to the requested admissions field.
Temple testing policy was manually repaired from the official first-year test-optional page after the auto-crawl missed a clean policy sentence.
School-people enrichment uses public third-party sources (RateMyProfessors and Wikipedia/Wikimedia), so rankings are heuristic rather than official university data.

popular_professors.ranking_basis: RateMyProfessors entries sorted by rating_count desc, then average_rating desc, then would_take_again_percent desc.
popular_professors.source_summary: Matched RateMyProfessors school 'Temple University' (legacyId=999) and ranked all professors with at least one rating.

successful_alumni.ranking_basis: Wikipedia list/category candidates ranked by trailing-365-day Wikipedia pageviews.
successful_alumni.source_summary: Candidates were harvested from school-specific Wikipedia alumni/people pages or categories, filtered to likely people, then ranked by pageviews.
